cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
Yen Sid
WUBRG 1WUBRG 6 Legendary Creature - Human Wizard Creature 3/5
2 Yen Sid is also a Keyblade-Wielder. When Yen Sid enters the battlefield target up to 2 legendary creatures in your library and put them on your hand. Whenever a legendary creatures enters the battlefield you may equip target equipement you control to it for {1} less. {2}, {T}: Create tapped Powerstone token. (It’s an artifact with “{T}: Add {C}. This mana can’t be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.”)
Sora, Keyblade's Choosen One
W 1WW 3 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 3/3
2 First strike For every other creature you control put a +1/+1 counter on Sora, Keyblade’s Choosen One. Equipment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
Riku, Redeemed Guardian
WB 2WB 4 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 4/3
2 Vigilance WB: Put a +1/+1 counter on Riku, Redeemed Guardian for every other attacking creature until end of turn. Active only when you declare attackers.
Kairi, Princess of Hearts
W WW 2 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 1/2
2 {T}: Add one mana of any color. 2W, {T}: Search your library for a white creature card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on your hand.
Mickey Mouse, Keyblade Master
W 4W 5 Legendary Creature - Mouse Keyblade-Wielder Creature 4/5
2 Indestructible, haste If a creature you control would be destroyed you may cast Mickey Mouse, Keyblade Master as though it had flash by paying WWW instead of its mana cost, then exile that creature. At the end of the turn put Mickey Mouse, Keyblade Master in your hand, then put target creature tapped on battlefield.
Aqua, Guardian of hope
U 3U 4 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 2/5
2 Vigilance Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. 1WU: Put a +0/+2 counter on target creature.
Ventus, Guardian of Purity
W 3W 4 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 2/3
2 Double strike, haste Ventus, Guardian of Purity must attack if able. {T} : Surveil {1} (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card into your graveyard.)
Terra, Guardian of Fury
G 3G 4 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 4/4
2 Trample, menace Whenever Terra, Guardian of Fury attacks put a +1/+0 counter on it. Whenever Terra, Guardian of Fury destroys one or more creatures put a +0/+1 on it.
Eraqus, Master of Guardians
W 1WW 3 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 4/4
2 Vigilance WW, {T}: Scry 3 (To scry 3, look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom of your library and the rest on top in any order.)
Chirithy
W 1W 2 Creature - Bear Creature 0/3
2 Flash When Chirithy enters the battlefield, choose up to one target permanent card in your graveyard that was put there from the battlefield this turn. Return it to your hand.
Ephemer, Last Dandelion
W 3W 4 Legendary Creature - Human Keyblade-Wielder Creature 2/2
2 When Ephemer, Last Dandelion enters the battlefield destroy all artifact you control, for every artifact destroyed this way you may destroy target creature. This ability can’t be negated.
DiZ, the Researcher
2 2 Legendary Creature - Human Creature 0/2
2 Sacrifice DiZ, the Researcher: Remove all counters from target permanent.
Scala ad Caelum
0 Legendary Land Land
0 You can play Scala ad Caelum only if you control a Keyblade-Wielder. {1}, {T}: Add WW. Activate only if you control a Keyblade-Wielder.
Mysterious Tower
0 Land Land
0 Mysterious Tower enters the battlefield tapped. {T}: Add {W} When a Keyblade-Wielder enters the battlefield, add {W} to your mana pool.
Lingering Will
G 5GG 7 Legendary Artifact Creature - Golem Keyblade-Wielder Creature 7/7
2 Boss At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Super Wild Dance — Lingering Will gains double strike and its power becomes 4 until end of turn. • Wave Rider — Lingering Will gains trample and flying until your next upkeep. • Whip attack — Lingering Will gains reach and vigilance until your next upkeep. • Ultima Cannon — Lingering Will deals X damage to any target unless target’s owner taps all lands where X is Lingering Will’s power .
Tokens</-->
